title: Youtube Poop: CD-I Fight Episode 2
description:
"WARNING SPOILER DON'T READ UNTILL YOU SAW THE VIDEO!"










"Last Warning!" XD Well if you don't care about getting spoil on who going to win then you can read i guess...









Why Triforced Link won?

1: Because Triforced Link have the three legendary Triforce with him, that's make him more that GodLike!

2: The Mystic Stare was strong enough to kill Triforced Link?
A: Without the Mirror Shield yes.

3: How come WeeGee OverlLimit did nothing to Triforced Link? 
A: Because Triforced Link was just to powerful.

4: Is WeeGee still alive at the end? 
A: Yes and he got even stronger.

5: What Triforced Link Power Level? 
A: Around 1,500,000,000

6: Why the video was so short? 
A: At some point i ran out of idea so before i start rushing the video and make it CRAPPY i decided to end it sooner.
